title: Darken theme and update PIN code to 18/215

requirements.summary: Update the frontend color theme to a darker visual style by adjusting CSS custom property palette in frontend/src/index.css while preserving the warm earthy palette identity
acceptanceCriteria: The app background and surface areas are visibly darker than before
The warm earthy color palette identity is preserved
Both light and dark theme CSS tokens are updated consistently
Text remains readable with sufficient contrast against the darkened backgrounds
No white or very light backgrounds appear on main content areas

file_operations.description: Darken the CSS custom property palette for both light and dark themes. Reduce the lightness values in OKLCH color definitions for --background, --card, --popover, --muted, and --sidebar-* tokens to create noticeably darker surfaces. Keep the existing hue and chroma values to preserve the warm earthy palette direction. Ensure --foreground and text tokens maintain sufficient contrast against the darkened backgrounds for readability.
